# @lumiarq/planner

Plan generation and determinism tools for Lumiarq execution graphs.

## What it does

- Creates execution plans from IR and adapter metadata
- Computes DAG ordering for dependent plan steps
- Provides plan lock/hash checks for drift detection

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/planner
```

## Contributing

1. Add tests for ordering and determinism.
2. Keep planner output stable for identical inputs.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/planner test typecheck build`.
